name: Newt
description: Tokyo-made headless CMS — REST/GraphQL APIs, rich-text editor and schema-first modeling for JAMstack teams.

seo.title: Newt — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Newt: Tokyo-made headless CMS — REST/GraphQL APIs, rich-text editor and schema-first modeling for JAMstack teams.

when_to_use: Headless CMS with GraphQL API for JAMstack teams
Schema-first content modeling for structured publishing
Japanese headless CMS for Nuxt/Next.js projects
Preview mode for staged content in production workflow

review.verdict: Capable headless CMS with modern DX, but microCMS and Contentful offer more momentum for most teams.
review.best_for: Japanese Jamstack teams wanting native GraphQL CMS
review.not_for: International projects needing vendor longevity signals

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Headless CMS with API, content exportable
